cases.prompt: 이번 패치 노트 만들어줘. v1.3.0 → v1.4.0 인데 GitHub랑 Play Store 둘 다 필요해.

assertions.text: Produces two separated artifacts: a developer-facing CHANGELOG/release body and a user-facing store copy
Pulls the actual git log/diff for the tag range to avoid hallucinating changes
Keeps the user-facing store copy short, benefit-led, jargon-free, and under ~500 chars

cases.prompt: Need to write the 'what's new' for the App Store. Just shipped 12 commits.

assertions.text: Separates internal-only changes from user-visible ones
Runs the user-facing copy through the human-voice-guard heuristics (plain human voice)
